name: Noob: Parkour 2D
description: Welcome to Noob: Parkour 2D! Noob: Parkour 2D is a parkour game set in a Minecraft-style world where you must overcome obstacles. Game features: Conquer challenging parkour courses, defeat enemies, collect keys, and move on to the next course! Remember, you are a great player and you must win! If you enjoyed the game, please rate it!
instructions: W A S D or Arrow Keys Double jump activated
